title: Monday automations - date has passed
excerpt:
Regarding “date has passed” automation. 
is this automation will run every day for item that its date passed, 
or will it run only once?

posts.author: avivgolan (Aviv Golan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Regarding “date has passed” automation.
is this automation will run every day for item that its date passed,
or will it run only once?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Aviv!

Charlotte here with the monday team! You can set it up for either! It depends on the trigger!

Example 1 - to make the automation run every day after the date:

Screen Shot 2023-12-07 at 4.20.45 PM1106×330 12.7 KB

Example 2 - to make the automation run one time after the date:

Screen Shot 2023-12-07 at 4.20.58 PM780×372 11 KB

I hope this helps!

posts.author: avivgolan (Aviv Golan)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Charlotte, it took me time to find it, helped me a lot
